flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Texas A & M University-Commerce rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5k → 9.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas A & M University-Commerce rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (25.7% → 28.5%).
